series.curator_notes: Series spans 3 Spotify artists: main series (1BElEHaU2xaZg7FOGsSird), ermittelt spinoff (6wlMx6MhWCynm8yVU0K3V3), and Endlich Ferien spinoff (05iCN3BdeaMyUYHXiEp761). Main series has both Hörspiel (compact ~20-25 tracks) and Hörbuch (full ~50 tracks) formats per episode - included only the Hörspiel versions as canonical. Spinoff series are included as part of this catalog. Film adaptations, soundtracks, box sets, joke collections, and audiobook versions excluded.

splits.new_title: Die Schule der magischen Tiere: Endlich Ferien
splits.reason: Spin-off series about holiday adventures with the magical animals. Separate product line from main series - 9 episodes following the Endlich Ferien books.

splits.new_title: Die Schule der magischen Tiere: Ermittelt
splits.reason: Spin-off detective series for early readers (Erstleser). Mini-krimis with shorter episodes. Different format and target audience than main series.

review.notes:
Series structure: Three distinct product lines were mixed together:

1. MAIN SERIES: Episodes 1-16 (kept in original series)
2. ENDLICH FERIEN: Spin-off holiday series - 9 episodes now split to separate series
3. ERMITTELT: Detective spin-off for early readers - 7 episodes now split to separate series

The ermittelt series has two formats:
- Old format: "Hörspiele 2-6" (episodes 2-6)
- New format: "Neuausgabe 1, 7" (2025 re-releases, episodes 1 and 7)

Gaps noted:
- Endlich Ferien: episodes 1-9 complete, episode 10 does not exist yet (confirmed via search)
- Ermittelt: episodes 1-7 available (1 and 7 are Neuausgabe format, 2-6 are Hörspiele format)
- Main series: episodes 1-16 complete
- Eingeschneit: standalone special episode excluded (not part of numbered series)

Excluded albums from main series are all spin-offs or standalone specials that don't belong in the core numbered series.
